summary: Completed frontend testing for Pipeline page updates. All 11 requested features are working correctly. Deal cards show linked companies with green icon, Deal Detail slide-in panel shows all required fields including PIPELINE STAGE tabs and LINKED COMPANIES section with company cards, and View button navigates to lead detail page.
passed_tests: Pipeline page shows 5 stages: Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Sales Closed
Deal cards show linked company with green Building2 icon in emerald circle
Deal cards show company name (e.g., 'Medipro Sdn Bhd')
Deal cards support '+X more' when multiple companies linked (code verified at line 317-319)
Clicking on a deal card opens Deal Detail slide-in panel
Add Deal button opens slide-in panel with 'Create New Deal' title
Create Deal panel has LINK COMPANIES section with search input and company checkboxes
Deal Detail panel shows DEAL TITLE label and value ('GLOCO Cloud EMR')
Deal Detail panel shows DEAL VALUE ($8,800) and EXPECTED CLOSE (2026-03-30)
Deal Detail panel shows PIPELINE STAGE tabs (Lead highlighted, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Sales Closed)
Deal Detail panel shows LINKED COMPANIES section with company cards
Company card shows avatar with initials ('MS'), name, industry ('Healthcare - Malaysia')
Company card shows PIC ('Dr. Raj Kumar'), MOBILE ('011-1234567'), LOCATION ('Kuala Lumpur, W.P. Kuala Lumpur')
View button on company card navigates to lead detail page (/leads/0d654912-2d92-4104-a2f1-699db80d4620)
critical_code_review_comments: Pipeline.jsx line 317-319: '+X more' pattern correctly implemented using linked_companies_count
Company card avatar uses first letters of company name (line 456-457) - works correctly
View button correctly uses navigate() to /leads/{company.id} (line 478-479)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test deal: 'GLOCO Cloud EMR' linked to lead 'Medipro Sdn Bhd' (ID: 0d654912-2d92-4104-a2f1-699db80d4620)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page fully tested with all features working: 1) 5 pipeline stages displayed correctly (Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Sales Closed), 2) Deal cards show linked companies with green icon, 3) Deal Detail slide-in panel opens on click with DEAL TITLE, DEAL VALUE, EXPECTED CLOSE, PIPELINE STAGE tabs, and LINKED COMPANIES section, 4) Company cards in Detail panel show avatar, name, industry, PIC, Mobile, Location, and View button, 5) View button navigates to /leads/{id}, 6) Add Deal panel has LINK COMPANIES section with search and checkboxes

features_verified.pipeline_stages: Working - 5 stages: Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Sales Closed
features_verified.deal_card_linked_company: Working - Shows green Building2 icon with company name
features_verified.deal_card_plus_more: Code verified - Shows '+X more' when linked_companies_count > 1
features_verified.deal_detail_slide_in: Working - Opens from right with deal info
features_verified.deal_detail_title_value_close: Working - Shows DEAL TITLE, DEAL VALUE, EXPECTED CLOSE
features_verified.deal_detail_linked_companies: Working - Shows company cards with all info
features_verified.company_card_avatar: Working - Shows initials in green circle
features_verified.company_card_info: Working - Shows name, industry, PIC, Mobile, Location
features_verified.add_deal_link_companies: Working - Has search input and company checkboxes
